summary.intent: Add Mantine as the UI component library to the Electron/Vite app and migrate all existing screens and components to use Mantine primitives instead of custom StyleSheet/primitives.
summary.outcome: Mantine was fully installed and configured with PostCSS support, and all 16 renderer files were migrated to use Mantine components (Table, Timeline, Collapse, Badge, Loader, Alert, Code, ScrollArea, etc.).

repo: Project is at /Users/stephanostsoucas/gossamer/app with an Electron/Vite setup; renderer source lives at app/src/renderer/src/

Screens: ActiveSessions, SessionDetail, SessionTree, Checkpoints, CheckpointTimeline, CheckpointDetail; Components: SessionRow, EventItem, ToolGroupItem, ToolUseItem, CheckpointMessageItem, MarkdownView
PostCSS config must be .cjs (postcss.config.cjs) for Mantine CSS variable support in this Vite setup
MantineProvider wraps the app in main.tsx alongside the @mantine/core/styles.css import
SessionRow renders as Table.Tr/Table.Td — it is a table row component, not a standalone card

code.finding: MantineProvider wraps the root; @mantine/core/styles.css imported here
postcss-preset-mantine required for Mantine CSS variable support; must be .cjs not .mjs in this project
Uses Mantine Timeline with branch-colored bullets and ScrollArea
Mantine Table with stickyHeader + Table.ScrollContainer; Loader/Alert/Center for loading and error states
Uses Mantine Code block for diffs/output and Collapse for expansion

workflow: Run a build (not just dev server) after library migrations to catch all import and type errors before moving on
Mantine requires both the npm packages (@mantine/core, @mantine/hooks) and postcss-preset-mantine for full functionality

friction: PostCSS configuration required a separate install step and a .cjs file — not obvious from Mantine docs alone for Vite setups
open_items: MarkdownView.tsx was read but not migrated — may still use custom primitives
primitives.tsx still exists in the renderer; should be audited and potentially deleted once all consumers are confirmed migrated
No theming or dark mode configuration was set up for MantineProvider — default theme only
